title: De-contaminate is_northmarq — SIDE-RECONCILED (SF Comp universe x SF Deal side)
status: DRY-RUN — no production flags flipped. Awaiting Scott's re-gate.

method.step1_nm_universe: public.sf_internal_comp_export status='Sold'. Comp Type=Internal = a Northmarq/SJC sale (Scott-confirmed). Fingerprint-matches a domain sale.
method.step2_side: public.sf_deal_export (from data.xlsx Deal export, 271 rows w/ Direct_Co_Broke). is_northmarq=true ONLY for 'Direct (Both)' / 'Co-Broke (Seller)'. 'Co-Broke (Buyer)' -> is_northmarq_buyside. Side ABSENT -> HOLD (no flip).
method.matcher: Comp->sale: state + sold_date +/-120d + sold_price +/-6%, confirm city OR tenant OR <=25mi geocoded proximity (city-centroid gazetteer from 10,556 geocoded properties). Deal->sale side identified at a TIGHT +/-1.5% price to avoid dense-metro cross-attribution.
method.buyside_caveat: The Comp object carries no broker/side columns, so buy-side is recoverable ONLY via the Deal object. Where the Deal export lacks a row, the sale is held, not flipped.

matching.note: proximity adds little because same-operator tenant matching (Fresenius/DaVita) already catches metro-split pairs (Youngstown/Austintown both Fresenius).

held_for_gate.flagged_comp_unmatched_non_competitor: ~211 (75 NM/SJC broker keep / 66 null / ~70 other) — not stripped

v1_correction.note: v1 (Comp-only) claimed 4 R74-removes should be RE-ADDED as listing comps. The Deal side REFUTES 3 of them: 5359 + 5489 exact-price-match a Co-Broke(Buyer) deal -> buy-side; 6375 + 8347 have no Deal side -> held. R74 was RIGHT to remove them from the listing set. Only the Deal layer surfaces this — the v2 fix.

dia.m&m_contradictions: 8327 / 13137: not in the Internal set + M&M broker -> confident REMOVE (unchanged from v1).

topic20_value_prop.conclusion: REPRODUCES: deck 6.38% = the side-reconciled NM LISTING median over the all-time window (6.40%). Excluding buy-side (median 6.10%, the deals NM negotiated tighter) is the correct treatment and #20 still lands at 6.40%.

gov.status: REPORT-ONLY — cannot be side-reconciled this round: no gov Deal export (data.xlsx is dia-only) and no is_northmarq_source/is_northmarq_buyside columns. Reinforces HOLD.
gov.cap_finding: No Internal-vs-DB basis contradiction (export 8.00% = matched DB 8.00% = current flags 7.90%). The deck's ~6.78% is a different cohort/aggregation. Get the gov Deal export (Direct_Co_Broke) before any gov re-flag, same as dia.

guardrails_honored: Two-source: Comp universe AND Deal side. Listing-only -> is_northmarq; Buyer -> is_northmarq_buyside; side absent -> hold.
Flag-column + is_northmarq_source + is_northmarq_buyside only. No price/term/cap writes.
City test loosened to metro/proximity via geocoding (<=25mi).
Removes staged (competitor-broker spot-check); not bulk-stripped. Idempotent. dia first; gov report-only.
